title: Meet Our New Director of Finance and Operations!
summary: On May 7th, Alaska Conservation Foundation gained a new team member! Ruan du Plessis joined us as our Director of Finance and Operations. Ruan was born and raised about as far away from the Alaskan wilderness as one can get – at the Southern tip of Africa. He spent five years with PwC, both in South...

title: Consider Fred Meyer Rewards for KUAC
summary: Take a couple of simple steps to send “extra” rewards from Fred Meyer to KUAC. This does not affect your personal rewards and brings in a little extra for your favorite public broadcasting stations. Visit www.fredmeyer.com/communityrewards and add KUAC #WX058 as the recipient. Thank you!
